programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Fire Rescue: Pups Save the Flaming Flounder; Fire Rescue: Pups Make the News
programme.desc: Francois' pants catch on fire, sending both the Lighthouse and Cap'n Turbot's Flounder up in flames; a news crew is in town when Chickaletta accidentally causes a fire in Adventure Bay's new parkette.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Tour Bus; Pups Save Midnight at the Museum
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom; a fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the mini-patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T. rex.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Dancing With Luke Stars; Pups Save a Mischievous Octopus
programme.desc: A dance contest being judged by Luke Stars goes wrong when a floating dance floor carries the contestants away; the pups investigate a mystery at an undersea-themed museum exhibit and discover an octopus that wants to return to the ocean.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Little Hairy; Pups Save a Kooky Climber
programme.desc: Big Hairy's little brother falls into a hole, and Tracker gets carried away by Big Hairy; Danny tries extreme rock climbing with Ace Sorenson.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Gym
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble and Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show but when the beam is too high for Lily, the pups must save the day; Rubble and Crew decide to build a show on their own when a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.sub-title: Lucky Croc; Sleepover Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile search for a lucky item to help them win a bike raffle. When Mr. Crocodile can't fall asleep at his first sleepover, Daisy helps him figure out why.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Big Truck Pups: Pups Save the Bridge
programme.desc: Ryder and the Pups team up with Al to save Adventure Bay's big bridge from collapsing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Air Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-stronaut
programme.desc: Captain Gordy and his space shuttle are blasting off from the Adventure Bay Airport with a satellite! But when Mayor Humdinger sneaks on board to snap a couple of selfies, the space shuttle blasts off with him still inside! Air Rescue pups save him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: In this lively animated adventure, undersea oddball SpongeBob SquarePants and his starfish friend, Patrick, embark on a quest to clear the name of Mr. Krabs, the owner of the Krusty Krab restaurant, who has been framed for stealing the crown of ocean deity King Neptune. Leaving the familiar confines of Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob and Patrick venture out towards Shell City, where they hope to find Neptune's crown, but numerous obstacles stand (or float) in their way.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: Visiting Vikings
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel to Viking times.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: Two Pests in a Teapot; Partial Recall
programme.desc: Patrick housesits for Granny Tentacles; the Dartfish adopt Plankton.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Grill Is Gone; The Night Patty
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back; SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Bubbletown; Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown, Bubbletown; Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Squirrel Jelly; The String
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick have their peaceful day of jelly fishing disturbed by Sandy's competitive nature; SpongeBob pulls from Squidward's shirt a loose string that never seems to end.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: FarmerBob; Gary & Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins' farm, much to his dismay; Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal, Spot.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Nitwitting; The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses; Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Now that Dracula has opened the Hotel Transylvania's doors to humans, things are changing for the better; however, Drac is secretly worried that his half-human grandson, Dennis, isn't showing his vampire side. So, while Mavis and Johnny are away, Drac enlists his friends to help him put the boy through a "monster-in-training" boot camp. But things really get batty when Drac's cantankerous, old-school dad pays an unexpected visit.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Metaphorical Tunnel
programme.desc: Chandler tries to get over his fear of commitment; Phoebe poses as Joey's agent after she forgets to tell him about an audition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Frank Jr
programme.desc: Phoebe tries to bond with her half brother, Frank Jr., by offering to buy a massage; Ross spots Isabella Rossellini; Joey tries to build an entertainment center.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Hook-Up Reverberation
programme.desc: Raj's honesty comes back to haunt him when his new girlfriend is unfriendly to Penny; the guys think about becoming part owners in Stuart's store.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Focus Attenuation
programme.desc: During their weekend in Las Vegas, Bernadette and Amy accuse Penny of being a buzz kill; the guys try to invent the next big thing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Expedition Approximation
programme.desc: Raj and Sheldon try to simulate a dark-matter research expedition; after a fight about money, Penny and Leonard turn to Bernadette and Wolowitz for advice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Misinterpretation Agitation
programme.desc: The guys try to help when Penny is faced with an awkward dilemma at work; Bernadette and Amy discuss sexuality and female scientists.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Prom Equivalency
programme.desc: Sheldon feels pressured to participate in romantic traditions when the gang re-creates a high-school prom on the roof.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Flashback
programme.desc: When Janice asks the gang if any of them have ever slept together, the friends flash back to three years earlier.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Race Car Bed
programme.desc: Joey sees Janice kissing her husband, whom she is divorcing while she dates Chandler; Rachel's father clashes with Ross.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Giant Poking Device
programme.desc: Chandler is devastated after Joey tells him he saw Janice kissing her ex-husband; Monica accidentally bumps Ben's head into a post when she and Rachel babysit; Phoebe is paranoid if she goes to dentist someone she knows will die.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Football
programme.desc: Emotions become the feast of the day when the gang plays a game of touch football on Thanksgiving; the turkey is left stewing when the losing team calls for a rematch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel Quits
programme.desc: Rachel wonders if she'll ever get another job after she quits Central Perk; Joey's new job selling Christmas trees upsets Phoebe; Ross accidentally breaks a little girl's leg.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Remember Which Sister
programme.desc: Ross is suspicious about Rachel's possible job offer from a good-looking stranger (Steven Eckholdt); Chandler can't remember which of Joey's many sisters he kissed at a party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Jealousy
programme.desc: Ross becomes jealous when he hears Rachel's new co-worker (Steven Eckholdt) whispering sweet nothings to her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Just Friends
programme.desc: Running into Richard at the video store tests Monica's willpower; Joey agrees to read "Little Women.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One's Ready
programme.desc: In a race against the clock, Ross tries to get the gang dressed and ready for a black-tie benefit at the museum.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Pilot
programme.desc: A friendly Midwesterner moves his family to a Los Angeles neighborhood next door to Calvin, who's concerned the newcomers will disrupt the culture on the block.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Repipe
programme.desc: When a water pipe bursts at the Johnsons' home, Calvin reluctantly agrees to help Dave repair the damage; Gemma discovers a surprising secret about her new neighbor, Tina.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Spare Key
programme.desc: Dave gives Calvin a key to his house in case of an emergency and is pleasantly surprised when the gesture is reciprocated.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Sandy's Rocket; Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Sandy Cheeks takes a rocket ship into space; Mr. Krabs gives SpongeBob a pair of squeaky boots.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Moto Pups: Pups Save a Moto Mayor
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway thinks she can change the Ruff-Ruff pack's naughty ways by pretending to be a bad biker and becoming part of their gang; but when Gasket puts the Mayor through a battery of tough tests, it's up to the Moto Pups to rescue her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups vs. the Robo-Ducky; Pups Save the Lost Penguin
programme.desc: Digi and Tal build a big Robo-Ducky that runs amok through Adventure Bay; when Mayor Goodway tries to catch a glimpse of a migrating penguin colony, her precious Chickaletta and a Baby Penguin accidentally switch places.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Their Digi-Tal Friends; Pups Save the Rainbow
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must save the day when two overly helpful robots take on more than they can handle; in a dream, Mayor Humdinger finds a prism that makes rainbows and drains Adventure Bay of color; the pups must restore color to Adventure Bay.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Big Bad Bird Crew; Pups Save a Soapbox Derby
programme.desc: Myrna the Mynah bird leads her new feathered friends astray, and it's up to the PAW Patrol to rescue the wayward flock; Adventure Bay is holding a "kids only" soapbox derby race when a mysterious newcomer named Hum-Kid shows up, breaking the rules.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: The Sleepy Princess; Fancy Dress Party; Mister Skinnylegs; Musical Instruments; The Tooth Fairy
programme.desc: Daddy Pig tells a bedtime story; Peppa and George have a fancy dress party; George finds a spider; Mummy and Daddy Pig find an old box; Peppa loses a tooth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Rubble-Double; Pups Save a Clown
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double; the Pups must save Humdinger and his kittens when they mess around with Blinky the Clown's tiny clown car.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Fire Rescue: Pups Save a Baby Goat Birthday; Fire Rescue: Pups Save a S'more-Mergency
programme.desc: When Farmer Yumi and Al's baby goat birthday party goes up in flames, they call on the Fire Rescue Pups to put it out; Mayor Humdinger goes camping and has just one thing on his mind: s'mores, but roasting marshmallows turns into a disaster.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Hum-Sprayer; Pups Save the Hot Springs
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes a mess when he steals paint from Rubble's cousin Mix; two mountain goats cause trouble at adventure bay's hot springs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Solve a Snap-N-Wrap Problem ; Pups Save Helga and the Dingers
programme.desc: Before Chickaletta's play date with Baby Yukiko, Mayor Goodway baby-proofs the playground, wrapping everything in rubbery Snap-N-Wrap and gets stuck; Mayor Humdinger loses his voice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Sore Dino; Dino Rescue: Pups Save the Triceratops Tag-Alongs
programme.desc: In the Dino Wilds, a sightseeing expedition quickly turns into a wild Dino ride.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Playground; The Crew Fixes a Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, Rubble & Crew get creative and build a new one with old materials; the town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in; luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.sub-title: Birthday Party; Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before; rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Moto Pup: Pups Save a Sneezy Chase; Moto Pups: Rescue at Twisty Top Mesa
programme.desc: Moto Pups must rescue the baddies off the Twisty Top Mesa; Chase's cat allergies lead him to the desert, and he's trapped with the Ruff Ruff Pack.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Big Truck Pups Save a Sliding Chalet; Big Truck Pups Save a Really Big Dish
programme.desc: The pups try to save Jake's chalet from crashing; the mayor downs a satellite dish.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: The mischievous Minions hope that Gru will return to a life of crime after the new boss of the Anti-Villain League fires him. Instead, Gru decides to remain retired and travel to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. The reunited siblings soon find themselves in an uneasy alliance to take down the elusive Balthazar Bratt, a former 1980s child star who seeks revenge against the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Now that Dracula has opened the Hotel Transylvania's doors to humans, things are changing for the better; however, Drac is secretly worried that his half-human grandson, Dennis, isn't showing his vampire side. So, while Mavis and Johnny are away, Drac enlists his friends to help him put the boy through a "monster-in-training" boot camp. But things really get batty when Drac's cantankerous, old-school dad pays an unexpected visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Shell Games; Senior Discount
programme.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle that overslept; old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Goofy Scoopers; Pat the Dog
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick make it their mission to reunite the recently fired robot band from Goofy Goober's; Patrick is sent to the pound for acting like a worm, but he won't be able to leave unless SpongeBob can train him.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: The mischievous Minions hope that Gru will return to a life of crime after the new boss of the Anti-Villain League fires him. Instead, Gru decides to remain retired and travel to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Phoebe's Ex-Partner

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take a Break
programme.desc: Phoebe can't communicate with her new boyfriend, a UN diplomat who doesn't speak English; Ross seeks solace at a party after a bitter fight with Rachel.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Septum Deviation

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Space Probe Disintegration

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.sub-title: The Troll Manifestation

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Morning After
programme.desc: A remorseful Ross tries to prevent Rachel from learning his disturbing secret; Monica, Phoebe, Chandler and Joey spend a night eavesdropping.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Hypnosis Tape
programme.desc: Phoebe's brother wants to marry a woman twice his age; Monica gets a huge tip from an admirer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Tiny T-Shirt
programme.desc: Ross is upset when Rachel returns his personal belongings and dates Mark; Monica dates a millionaire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Dollhouse
programme.desc: Monica's aunt dies and leaves her an antique dollhouse that she doesn't want Phoebe to play with; Rachel regrets making a date for Chandler and her boss, Joanna; Joey's interest in Kate intensifies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With a Chick and a Duck
programme.desc: Monica considers accepting a dream job in Pete's new restaurant but fears there is more to the deal; Ross makes a sacrifice for Rachel.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Screamer
programme.desc: The gang goes to the opening night of Joey's plays; Rachel brings a date (Ben Stiller) to make Ross jealous; Joey's play gets terrible reviews, but his co-star provides some comfort.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross's Thing
programme.desc: Afflicted with a mysterious skin condition, Ross seeks advice from Guru Saj; Monica can't decide about Pete.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ultimate Fighting Champion
programme.desc: To her horror, Monica's boyfriend plans to fight; the friends are intrigued by a conversation between two strangers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Jam
programme.desc: Phoebe dates a man who thinks he's stalking her twin sister, Ursula; Ross and Rachel give Chandler "boyfriend" lessons.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Housewarming
programme.desc: Everyone but Calvin accepts Dave and Gemma's invitation to their housewarming party; Dave decides he's finally had enough of Calvin's refusal to welcome him to town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Game Night
programme.desc: Unexpected revelations are in the cards during the Johnsons' first game night with the Butlers; Gemma is prompted to rectify a past wrong; Malcolm makes a play for a fresh start with his father, Calvin.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Anniversary
programme.desc: Nothing goes as planned when Dave sets up an anniversary celebration for Gemma and Calvin; Tina baby-sits the Johnsons' son, Grover.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: No Hat for Pat; Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job holding a sign at the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob and Patrick are accidentally locked in a toy store after it closes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Chalk Art; Pups Save the Hot Potato
programme.desc: The Mini Patrol and the Pups race to save a mural before it rains; Farmer Al and Yumi discover their garden is full of holes and their one-of-a-kind potato is missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Pluck-O-Matic; Pups Save a Mascot
programme.desc: Yumi's new Robo-Corn Plucker goes haywire; Ryder and the "PAW Patrol" must get it under control; Daring Danny X, dressed as a "Bird X" mascot, gets carried away by a couple of eagles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Waiter-Bot; Pups Stop a Pie-Clone
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's new high-tech waiter robot helps around the café, but it can't stop cleaning; it's up to the pups to clean up the mess; Mayor Humdinger creates a cyclone of delicious pies, and the pups must stop it before the town is covered.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Dino Rescue: Pups and the Lost Dino Eggs
programme.desc: When a lost world of dinosaurs is discovered, Mayor Humdinger wants to take dino eggs back to Foggy Bottom, but along the way a baby Brachiosaurus ends up in dino-sized trouble.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Lost Gold Miner; Pups Save Uncle Otis From His Cabin
programme.desc: Uncle Otis takes a trip to gold mine; Uncle Otis installs a Smart Home 3000 in his cabin that ends up trapping him and Mr. Wingnut inside.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Rocket Roller Skater; Pups Save Ryder's Surprise
programme.desc: A mix-up delivery leads to Ms. Marjorie and Danny speeding out of control in Adventure Bay; the Pups must rescue them; Ryder's present ends up in the jungle; Carlos is trapped in a jungle gym.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: PAW Patrol: Fire Rescue
programme.desc: Join the PAW Patrol as they go on fire rescues!

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
